body:
## Summary

- Adds the official Dealix **Commercial Launch OS** (Saudi/GCC B2B AI Revenue & Operations OS).
- Establishes the **first 5 verticals**.
- Adds a **400+ daily review-only draft factory** (pure-stdlib, zero-network).
- Adds a **founder review queue** (markdown + CSV + top-50 + next-actions).
- Adds deterministic **quality / compliance / safety gates**.
- Adds a **GitHub Action** that is artifact-only (no secrets, no commit, no send).
- Adds a **commercial readiness report** and full bilingual (AR/EN) documentation.
- Adds a static `/commercial` web page (Next.js build verified).
- **No external sending.**

## First 5 Verticals

- Facilities Management & Maintenance
- Contracting & Project Controls
- Real Estate & Property Operations
- Legal & Professional Services (sensitive — privacy-first)
- Consulting, Training & B2B Services

## Offer ladder (SAR)

Entry Diagnostic 499–2,500 · Paid Pilot 5,000–25,000 · Department OS 25,000–150,000 · Monthly Retainer 3,000–25,000/mo · Enterprise Custom OS 150,000+.

## Safety Guarantees

- No SMTP · No WhatsApp sending · No LinkedIn automation · No website auto-submit · No scraping · No secrets · No external send from GitHub Actions.
- Every draft is locked to `send_allowed=false`, `external_send_blocked=true`, `requires_founder_approval=true`, `no_auto_send=true`.
- Forbidden statuses (`sent`, `auto_sent`, `queued_for_send`, `smtp_ready`, `whatsapp_ready`, `linkedin_auto_ready`) are never produced.
- The safety audit (`scripts/commercial_safety_audit.py`) is tiered: enablement flags fail anywhere; outbound-send code signatures fail in executable files; prose prohibitions are recorded as warnings so docs can name what's banned.

## Tests Run (actual results)

Commercial suite — **40 passed** (stdlib-only, run with `--noconftest -o addopts=""`):
```
tests/test_commercial_generate_400_drafts.py
tests/test_commercial_safety_audit.py
tests/test_commercial_launch_readiness.py
tests/test_commercial_no_external_send.py
tests/test_commercial_quality_gate.py
tests/test_commercial_compliance_gate.py
tests/test_commercial_outputs_schema.py
→ 40 passed in ~1.0s
```

Pipeline (actual):
```
seed leads:    count=5 ok=True
generate:      406 drafts (400 primary + 6 stress) — queue=400, rejected=6 (1 quality + 5 compliance, each with reasons)
               all_send_disallowed=True  all_send_blocked=True
safety audit:  pass=True  files_scanned=53  violations=0
readiness:     ready_draft_only=True (all checks OK)
```

Web build:
```
cd apps/web && npm ci && npm run verify  →  typecheck + next build OK; /commercial prerendered as static.
```

Make checks (honest status in this sandbox):
- `make env-check` → **PASS**
- `make security-smoke` → **pre-existing FAIL** on unrelated files (fake test secrets in `tests/test_wave8_*`, `tests/test_agent_observability_*`, `docs/ops/*` — all present on `origin/main`); **none of the new commercial files are flagged**.
- `make api-contract-check` / `make prod-verify` / `make test` → require the full app dependency stack (fastapi/pydantic) which is not installed in this environment; not run here. The Commercial Launch OS itself is pure-stdlib and runs without them.

## Go / No-Go

**✅ GO:** Draft generation · Founder review · Manual review · Manual copy/send after founder decision (out of repo) · Commercial documentation · Lead qualification · Discovery calls · Paid diagnostics.

**⛔ NO-GO:** Automated email sending · Automated LinkedIn outreach · WhatsApp cold outreach · Auto-submit website forms · Bulk email · Guaranteed-ROI claims · Processing sensitive customer data before agreement · Any external sending from GitHub Actions.

## Remaining External Work (out of repo)

- SPF / DKIM / DMARC · Google Postmaster · domain reputation monitoring (keep spam rate well below 0.30%)
- Manual suppression process · CRM / manual sending process · Calendly / payment / checkout
- Legal/privacy review (Privacy Policy, Terms, DPA, PDPL), incident/complaint handling

See `docs/commercial-launch/21_EXTERNAL_GO_LIVE_REQUIREMENTS.md` and `docs/commercial-launch/99_FINAL_COMMERCIAL_LAUNCH_READINESS_REPORT.md`.

## Notes / deliberate decisions

- Branch is the session's designated `claude/commercial-launch-official-os-x70JI` (per the harness branch policy) rather than `final/commercial-launch-official-os`; the PR targets `main`.
- Backend: no external-send endpoints were added. Existing `commercial` / `commercial_readiness` routers already cover read-only commercial data, so risky duplication was avoided.
- Runtime daily outputs are git-ignored; only a committed `_example/` template ships.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01S5KPybiQ6TUv7h5jmng8pW

---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_01S5KPybiQ6TUv7h5jmng8pW)_

commits.messageBody:
…afts

Adds the Dealix Commercial Launch OS: a pure-stdlib Daily Draft Factory that
generates >=400 review-only drafts/day across the first 5 verticals, with
deterministic quality, compliance, and safety gates, a founder review queue,
an artifact-only GitHub Action, full bilingual (AR/EN) documentation, a
/commercial web page, and a complete test suite.

No external sending anywhere: no SMTP, no WhatsApp, no LinkedIn automation,
no website auto-submit, no secrets. Every draft is locked to
send_allowed=false, external_send_blocked=true, requires_founder_approval=true,
no_auto_send=true.

commits.messageBody:
- Remove unused ch_cfg local in build_primary_drafts (CodeQL).
- Remove unused core import in test_commercial_no_external_send (CodeQL).
- Redirect each commercial test module's OUTPUT_ROOT to a unique temp dir so
  parallel pytest -n auto workers never race on or pollute outputs/.
